instructions: This repo hosts gamemds.org — walkthrough content, reader app, and deploy workflow.
Do not edit guides/<slug>/ section files by hand. They are generated by faqmd/scripts/split-guide.js.
To add a new walkthrough: build it in the faqmd repo, copy the generated guide/ directory to gamemds/guides/<slug>/, add an entry to guides.json, then push to main.
Deployment is automatic via .github/workflows/deploy.yml on push to main.
